goal: Keep JobSentinel in post-v2.9.1 closeout while preserving privacy, source boundaries, non-technical usability, verified dependencies, downloadable Agent Skills, explicit release evidence, and the locked Quiet Shield redesign in DESIGN.md, docs/design/README.md, and docs/design/design-spec.md.

activeWorkstreams.nextStep: Read first for v2.9.1 publication evidence, release-pipeline closeout scope, deferred v3 implementation, current next best work, and Rule 0 constraints.
Keep cleanup scoped to docs accuracy, harness health, bloat, portability, confirmed bug fixes, release metadata, and release-process evidence.
activeWorkstreams.verification: npm run harness:check; for redesign changes, add Computer Use or Playwright screenshot proof across touched routes, modals, toasts, settings, keyboard flow, and narrow-width states.

activeWorkstreams.nextStep: Reduce release time and hosted runner cost while preserving checksum, package, SBOM, attestation, and public-verification evidence.
activeWorkstreams.verification: npm run release:readiness -- --version 2.9.1; npm run lint:actions; npm run lint:security; npm run lint:docs; npm run lint:bloat; npm run harness:check; git diff --check

deferredWorkstreams.nextStep: Resume only after release-pipeline closeout or when the user explicitly reopens v3 implementation.
